_meta.purpose: Upcoming shows for the Bolo Boys website. Only upcoming shows are listed here — past shows are covered by social media.
_meta.schema_notes: Each event follows the structure below. Claude populates this via the event_workflow defined in project-context.json.

_schema_example.theme: Internal fun theme name (e.g. 'The Spring Kickoff')
_schema_example.invitation_text: Warm, playful, community-focused paragraph for expanded card view
_schema_example.additional_details: Any extra info (cover, age restriction, etc.)

events.invitation_text: We're kicking off a brand new concert series with the folks at Wild Heaven Brewing — and we couldn't be more excited. Grab a pint, grab a friend, and come join us at the Avondale location on a Friday night. Good beer, good vibes, live music. That's all you need.

events.venue_name: Grant Park Market in the Park
events.invitation_text: The Grant Park Conservancy is transforming the Boulevard Green into a community hub — vendors, music, programming, and free admission for all ages. We're proud to be playing the May edition of their new Market in the Park series, part of the same vision that's made the GPC Summer Shade Festival such a beloved Atlanta tradition. Come out Sunday, browse the market from 10 AM, and catch us live at 11.
events.additional_details: Market in the Park runs 10 AM–3 PM. Free and open to all ages. Bolo Boys play at 11 AM.

events.invitation_text: We're back at Wild Heaven Avondale, this time on a Saturday at 4 PM. No agenda, no dress code — just a great way to ease into the evening. Bring the crew, grab a table, and let the afternoon happen.
Monday night, East Atlanta Village, pizza, and Bolo Boys at 8 PM. If you've ever needed a reason to start your week right — here it is. Come hang.
events.additional_details: Part of the Grant Ole Opry series. Adam Klein opens at 7 PM, Bolo Boys at 8 PM. Free and family friendly.

events.invitation_text: Side Saddle is turning one, and we couldn't be more honored to be part of the celebration. This Beltline gem has become one of our favorite places to play — and honestly just to be — since we first stepped onto their patio. Great wine, great people, and a space that feels like it was made for live music. Come join us Sunday morning and help us raise a glass to a full year of Side Saddle getting it exactly right.
events.additional_details: Part of Side Saddle's 1-year anniversary weekend. Free and open to the public.

events.invitation_text: It's the last day of World Cup group stage play, and a match is being hosted right here in Atlanta. The games are inside, the music is outside — come catch both at Side Saddle. Jerseys welcome.
events.additional_details: World Cup Group Stage Final Day. Outdoor patio show — time subject to change based on weather.

events.invitation_text: The world's biggest game is today, and when the final whistle blows we'll be on the Side Saddle patio to help you celebrate — or commiserate. Come down after the match. Wear your jersey.
events.additional_details: World Cup Final after-party. Game kicks off at 3 PM — we go on after. Time TBD.

events.invitation_text: August is almost over and we're squeezing every last drop out of it. Come catch us on the Side Saddle patio before Georgia finally lets the summer go.
events.additional_details: Outdoor patio show — time subject to change based on weather.

events.invitation_text: DragonCon just wrapped and Shaky Knees is still two weeks out. In between, there's us — no wristband needed, no costume required. Just a good Saturday on the Side Saddle patio.
events.additional_details: Outdoor patio show — time subject to change based on weather. (Dragon Con 9/4–9/7 | Shaky Knees 9/18–9/20)

events.invitation_text: It's Halloween on the Beltline. Costumes are encouraged, spooky songs are in the set, and Side Saddle will be the place to be. Come as you are — or come as someone else entirely.
events.additional_details: Costumes encouraged. Outdoor patio show — time subject to change based on weather.

events.invitation_text: Thanksgiving is next week and the holiday madness is about to hit. Get ahead of it — spend a Saturday afternoon at Side Saddle with good wine, good company, and live music before the travel and the family gatherings and all the rest of it.
events.additional_details: Outdoor patio show — time subject to change based on weather.

events.invitation_text: We're marking one full year of live music at Side Saddle — and we couldn't have picked a better occasion than a Christmas party to celebrate. Come ring in the holiday season with us on the Beltline. It's been a great year. Let's toast it.
events.additional_details: One-year anniversary of the Bolo Boys concert series at Side Saddle. Outdoor patio show — time subject to change based on weather.
